endorsement_reason: The claim about the percentage of dehydrated items is accurate and aligns with the standards set in July 2, 1959.
The percentage of dehydrated items in the processed fruits and vegetables section, as of August 2023, is accurately stated as approximately 12% based on the standards set in July 1959.
The prior claim correctly states the percentage of dehydrated items listed in the standards as of August 2023.
The claim accurately reflects the percentage of dehydrated items as stated in the standards.
The claim is accurate and provides the necessary percentage of items in the dehydrated section that meet the specified criteria.
